style: blue white gray formal academic PPT, clean technical report
prompt: 16:9 PPT cover page. Official logo placeholder centered at top, title 基于 RISC-V 的五级流水 CPU 设计与 FPGA 验证, form rows for 初赛作品汇报, 第十届全国大学生集成电路创新创业大赛, CICC1003618, 芯银河战队. White background, dark blue title, thin horizontal rules, no school or personal identity.

style: blue white gray technical metrics slide
prompt: 16:9 PPT key metrics overview. Left sentence 面向 PYNQ-Z2 的轻量级高性能 RISC-V 软核 CPU. Right open large-number matrix: 4.137461 CoreMark/MHz, 2.908287 DMIPS/MHz, 4961 LUT, 50.0 MHz, PROGRAM_OK + 实时 UART 指标流. Bottom evidence chain 仿真, 性能, 资源, 时序, 上板.

style: blue white gray CPU highlight diagram
prompt: 16:9 PPT core highlights page. Center simplified five-stage CPU block, four surrounding highlights: Zmmul and Zba/Zbb/Zbs hotspot enhancement, JAL early redirect plus forwarding stall flush coordination, LUT < 5000 low resource strategy, RTL TestBench CoreMark Vivado PYNQ-Z2 validation closure.

style: blue white gray academic comparison chart
prompt: 16:9 PPT two-column mapping. Left contest constraints: RV32I/RV64I, FPGA prototype, 50 MHz, simulation and FPGA data, source comment rate, resource constraint. Right design choices: RV32I five-stage pipeline, PYNQ-Z2, 50 MHz, dual benchmark, parameterized extensions, LUT < 5000. Thin arrows between columns.

style: blue white gray SoC architecture diagram
prompt: 16:9 PPT SoC architecture diagram with modules YH_rv_cpu_fpga_top, YH_rv_cpu_soc, YH_rv_cpu, IF ID EX MEM WB, ROM, RAM, MMIO, UART TX, LED. White modules with dark blue borders, light blue-gray memory blocks, arrows for instruction flow, data flow, peripheral output.

style: blue white gray pipeline control diagram
prompt: 16:9 PPT five-stage pipeline control diagram. Horizontal IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB stages with stall, flush, forwarding, redirect control lines. Focus on correctness and performance, not too many signals, clean technical style.

style: blue white gray ISA extension map
prompt: 16:9 PPT ISA extension page. Center RV32I base block, committed path blocks Zmmul, Zba, Zbb, Zbs in dark blue. Exploration paths Zbc, XThead, IDBR shown as light gray dashed blocks. Emphasize hotspot acceleration and resource control.

style: blue white gray problem solution chart
prompt: 16:9 PPT problem-solution chart. Three columns: data hazard, control hazard, resource constraint. Solutions: forwarding + stall, JAL early redirect + branch redirect, parameterized closing of high-cost paths. Blue title, gray body text, thin connecting lines.

style: blue white gray FPGA adaptation page
prompt: 16:9 PPT FPGA adaptation and low-resource strategy. Left: PYNQ-Z2, xc7z020clg400-1, 125 MHz to 50 MHz clock path. Right: sequential five-stage pipeline, Zmmul uses DSP, switchable extensions, on-chip ROM/RAM. Bottom highlight 4961 LUT.

style: blue white gray layered validation pyramid
prompt: 16:9 PPT layered validation system. Four layers bottom to top: instruction/module directed tests, SoC smoke, CoreMark/Dhrystone benchmarks, Vivado resources timing and PYNQ-Z2 board bring-up. Top board layer emphasized with dark blue border.

style: blue white gray waveform evidence slide
prompt: 16:9 PPT waveform evidence page. Three horizontal waveform placeholders titled ID 分支快速重定向, JAL 快速重定向, Load-use 快速路径. Each has a few clean signal lines and two short annotations, with dark blue arrows highlighting observations.

style: blue white gray dual metric slide
prompt: 16:9 PPT dual performance result page. Left CoreMark: 4.137461 CoreMark/MHz, 2416941 ticks, 413.746136 iter/s. Right Dhrystone: 2.908287 DMIPS/MHz, 510986 Dhrystones/s, 10 runs. Bottom condition CPU 50.0 MHz; evidence from scripts, simulation logs, validation report.

style: blue white gray optimization staircase chart
prompt: 16:9 PPT optimization path breakdown. Left staircase from early baseline to frozen submission to exploration path: 0.912472, 4.060276, 4.137461, 5.162186 CoreMark/MHz. Frozen submission dark blue, high-performance exploration dashed and labeled resource over limit. Right contribution list: Zmmul, Zba/Zbb/Zbs, JAL early redirect, Forwarding/stall/flush, Dhrystone build and library path. Bottom line says LUT < 5000, 50 MHz, board-ready, reproducible are freeze principles.

style: blue white gray board evidence slide with video placeholder
prompt: 16:9 PPT FPGA board evidence page. Left half has a large 16:9 video placeholder with dark blue thin border, light blue-gray fill, simple play icon, text FPGA 原型系统上板视频位置：Vivado 下载 + PYNQ-Z2 连线 + UART 实时输出. Right resource timing table: 4961 LUT, 2367 FF, 6 BRAM, 15 DSP, WNS +0.338 ns, WHS +0.059 ns, CPU 50.0 MHz. Bottom two monospace log lines: PROGRAM_OK: xc7z020_1 and YH_rv_cpu CoreMark/MHz=4.137461 DMIPS/MHz=2.908287 tick=XX pc=XXXXXXXX.

16:9 PPT AI tool disclosure page. Two-column table: OpenAI for engineering scripts, hotspot analysis, rapid validation flow organization, log checking; DeepSeek for manuscript polishing, chapter logic checking, expression compression. Bottom statement: core CPU architecture, RTL final confirmation, test conclusions, metric decisions completed by team.

style: blue white gray final summary slide
prompt: 16:9 PPT final summary page. Center large words 高性能、低资源、可复现、可上板. Below three concise summaries: RV32I five-stage CPU and PYNQ-Z2 prototype; 4.137461 CoreMark/MHz and 2.908287 DMIPS/MHz within LUT < 5000 and 50 MHz; complete evidence chain. Bottom chain 技术说明书, 性能与验证报告, PPT, 源代码, FPGA 原型系统, 作品讲解视频, FPGA 上板视频. Right lower note 后续可开源复现.
